mapper.select: select d.* from set_meal_customer_mapping smcm, set_meal_record smr, set_meal_record_dish_mapping smrdm, dish d where smcm.customer_id = #{customerId} and smcm.date = #{date} and smcm.set_meal_id = smr.set_meal_id and smr.set_meal_record_id = smrdm.set_meal_record_id and smrdm.dish_id = d.dish_id and smr.time = #{time} and d.status = '0' and d.del_flag = '0' and smrdm.del_flag = '0' and smcm.del_flag = '0' and smr.del_flag = '0'
select * from dish where status = '0' and time = #{time} and pork = #{pork} and del_flag = '0' order by dish_id desc

select d.* from dish d, set_meal_record_dish_mapping smrdm, set_meal_record smr where smrdm.dish_id = d.dish_id and smrdm.set_meal_record_id = smr.set_meal_record_id and smr.set_meal_record_id = #{setMealRecordId} and smr.time = #{time} and d.status = '0' and d.del_flag = '0' and smrdm.del_flag = '0' and smr.del_flag = '0'
